mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM USERS WHERE IS_DELETED = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM USERS WHERE IS_DELETED = 0 AND CREATED_AT >= #{since}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT USER_ID) FROM ( SELECT USER_ID FROM DIABETES_CHECKIN.CHECKIN_RECORDS WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 AND CHECKIN_DATE >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) UNION SELECT USER_ID FROM DIABETES_CONSULTATION.CONSULTATION_SESSIONS WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 AND STARTED_AT >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) UNION SELECT USER_ID FROM DIABETES_HEALTH.RISK_ASSESSMENTS WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 AND ASSESSED_AT >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) UNION SELECT USER_ID FROM DIABETES_PLAN.HEALTH_PLANS WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 AND GENERATED_AT >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ) active_users
SELECT GENDER AS `key`, COUNT(1) AS `value` FROM USERS WHERE IS_DELETED = 0 GROUP BY GENDER ORDER BY GENDER

SELECT CASE WHEN BIRTH_DATE IS NULL THEN 'unknown' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, BIRTH_DATE, CURDATE()) < 18 THEN 'under_18' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, BIRTH_DATE, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 18 AND 29 THEN '18_29' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, BIRTH_DATE, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 30 AND 44 THEN '30_44' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, BIRTH_DATE, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 45 AND 59 THEN '45_59' ELSE '60_plus' END AS `key`, COUNT(1) AS `value` FROM USERS WHERE IS_DELETED = 0 GROUP BY `key` ORDER BY `key`
SELECT DATE(CREATED_AT) AS `date`, COUNT(1) AS `value` FROM USERS WHERE IS_DELETED = 0 AND CREATED_AT >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(CREATED_AT) ORDER BY `date`
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM DIABETES_HEALTH.HEALTH_RECORDS WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM DIABETES_HEALTH.RISK_ASSESSMENTS WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0
SELECT DIABETES_TYPE AS `key`, COUNT(1) AS `value` FROM DIABETES_HEALTH.HEALTH_RECORDS WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 GROUP BY DIABETES_TYPE ORDER BY DIABETES_TYPE
SELECT RISK_LEVEL AS `key`, COUNT(1) AS `value` FROM DIABETES_HEALTH.RISK_ASSESSMENTS WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 AND GENERATION_STATUS = 2 GROUP BY RISK_LEVEL ORDER BY RISK_LEVEL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM DIABETES_CHECKIN.CHECKIN_RECORDS WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM DIABETES_CHECKIN.CHECKIN_RECORDS WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 AND CHECKIN_DATE >= #{since}
SELECT CHECKIN_TYPE AS `key`, COUNT(1) AS `value` FROM DIABETES_CHECKIN.CHECKIN_RECORDS WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 GROUP BY CHECKIN_TYPE ORDER BY CHECKIN_TYPE

SELECT CHECKIN_DATE AS `date`, COUNT(1) AS `value` FROM DIABETES_CHECKIN.CHECKIN_RECORDS WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 AND CHECKIN_DATE >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY CHECKIN_DATE ORDER BY CHECKIN_DATE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM DIABETES_CONSULTATION.CONSULTATION_SESSIONS WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM DIABETES_CONSULTATION.CONSULTATION_SESSIONS WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 AND STATUS = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM DIABETES_CONSULTATION.CONSULTATION_MESSAGES WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0
SELECT AVG(RATING) FROM DIABETES_CONSULTATION.CONSULTATION_SESSIONS WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 AND RATING IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM DIABETES_PLAN.HEALTH_PLANS WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT USER_ID) FROM DIABETES_PLAN.HEALTH_PLANS WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM DIABETES_ARTICLE.ARTICLES WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM DIABETES_ARTICLE.ARTICLES WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 AND STATUS = 3
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM DIABETES_ARTICLE.ARTICLE_USER_READS WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM DIABETES_RESOURCES.VIDEOS WHERE IS_DELETED = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM USER_MESSAGES
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM USER_MESSAGES WHERE IS_READ = 0
SELECT MESSAGE_TYPE AS `key`, COUNT(1) AS `value` FROM USER_MESSAGES GROUP BY MESSAGE_TYPE ORDER BY `value` DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM USERS WHERE IS_DELETED = 0

SELECT u.USER_ID AS user_id, u.USERNAME AS username, u.NICKNAME AS nickname, u.PHONE AS phone, u.GENDER AS gender, u.POINTS AS points, u.CREATED_AT AS created_at, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM DIABETES_HEALTH.HEALTH_RECORDS hr WHERE hr.USER_ID = u.USER_ID AND hr.DEL_FLAG = 0) AS health_record_count, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM DIABETES_HEALTH.RISK_ASSESSMENTS ra WHERE ra.USER_ID = u.USER_ID AND ra.DEL_FLAG = 0) AS risk_assessment_count, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM DIABETES_CHECKIN.CHECKIN_RECORDS cr WHERE cr.USER_ID = u.USER_ID AND cr.DEL_FLAG = 0) AS checkin_count, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM DIABETES_CONSULTATION.CONSULTATION_SESSIONS cs WHERE cs.USER_ID = u.USER_ID AND cs.DEL_FLAG = 0) AS consultation_count, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM DIABETES_PLAN.HEALTH_PLANS hp WHERE hp.USER_ID = u.USER_ID AND hp.DEL_FLAG = 0) AS plan_count, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM DIABETES_ARTICLE.ARTICLE_USER_READS ar WHERE ar.USER_ID = u.USER_ID AND ar.DEL_FLAG = 0) AS article_read_count FROM USERS u WHERE u.IS_DELETED = 0 ORDER BY u.CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
